turns.user_message: I think I'm just not good at this anymore. It feels like I'm always one step behind.
I've started to believe I can't handle any of it. My confidence just keeps fading every single day.
I'm completely convinced I'm not capable anymore. The thought of trying makes me feel sick inside.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves. This just started recently.
